calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-08-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-09-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Terms of the Settlement to be placed on the Record.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Miles Lendway, CSR#13684.

Ginor J. Molinari, Esq., appearing for Plaintiffs Rafael Flores, Jorge A. Ortez, and Teresa Zambrano.
Donald E. Bloom, Esq., appearing for Defendant Jose A. Escolero. Counsel Donald E. Bloom also sworn as an Spanish Interpreter for his client.

Case has settled. Terms and Conditions of Settlement read into the record. Court ordered matter scheduled for a Order to Show Cause re: CRC3.1385 on December 9, 2014 at 10:30 AM in Department 610.
